name: Thrain Ironwound
sd_appearance: A burly, 4.5-foot-tall dwarf with a chiseled, weather-beaten face and a braided beard intricately patterned like the winding tunnels of the Undercity. His left cheek bears a deep, ragged scar that seems to tell a story of hardship and resilience. Clad in silver and white armor with blue accents, adorned with arena medals, he stands with a theatrical presence that commands attention. On his person, he carries practical adventuring gear, including a shortsword and a quiver of arrows. One distinctive visual detail: his eyes, a piercing ice blue, hold a determined glint that speaks volumes about his unwavering resolve.
faction_visual: silver and white armour with blue accents, arena medals, theatrical presence
style_note: eclectic — no faction marks, which is itself a statement
